arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EFS access point.

file_system_arn.description: The ARN of the EFS file system associated with this access point.

file_system_id.description: The ID of the EFS file system associated with this access point.

id.description: The ID of the EFS access point.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the EFS access point.

posix_user.description: The POSIX user settings for the access point, including user ID (UID), group ID (GID), and secondary group IDs.

root_directory.description: The root directory settings for the access point, specifying path and permission settings.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the EFS access point.
